chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA 163 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 22.12.2025 Mr. Waseem Sheikh, advocate for the appellant. Matter is pending since 2021 without any progress. There are repeated orders wherein time has been granted to the appellant for compliance of office objection. Despite such orders having been passed in last four years, even today matter is listed for orders as to non-prosecution and learned counsel merely seeks more time. It appears that the appellant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the High Court Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
